title: Move comparison into repository page
summary: Repository comparison now lives in the repository page Compare tab, and comparison API responses no longer expose null section arrays that crash the UI.
userVisibleChange: Users compare snapshots from a repository Compare tab by selecting From and To snapshots directly from the repository timeline.

risks.title: Repositories with fewer than two snapshots show an empty Compare state instead of a comparison.

decisions.title: Remove the standalone /compare page and keep comparison scoped to one repository's timeline.

validation.command: Playwright verified /repositories/eve Compare tab renders and updates the selected comparison range without the reported runtime error.
